description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of wood and dark stone cladding on the exterior. The front facade features large windows, a covered entryway, and a prominent garage with two doors. The house has a rectangular footprint, with multiple rooms visible through the open plan and large window openings on all sides. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more regularly spaced. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and stone exterior, large windows, and a double garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, wood paneling, and double garage doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, wood and stone cladding, and multiple windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large garage doors, wood paneling, and several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, stone cladding, and the driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, modern door, and adjacent large windows
